name: Tomato Gravy and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry bacon in a frying pan until cooked through but not crisp. Cut into pieces.
2. Add the chopped onions and green peppers to the pan. Sauté until softened.
3. Stir in the crushed tomatoes and let simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. In a separate bowl, mix the flour with enough water to form a smooth paste.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture to the saucepan, stirring constantly until thickened.
7. Serve the gravy over rice.
Serves 4-6.
Note: Sausage or ham can be substituted for the bacon.
